purpose: Canonical machine contract for governed review cycles across ADF components.

roster_requirements.required_pair_shape: Each active review pair must contain exactly one Codex reviewer and one Claude reviewer.

review_modes.full: Review the whole artifact and perform a full rulebook sweep.
review_modes.delta: Review only changed sections plus any directly affected cross-cutting areas.
review_modes.regression_sanity: Check only the changed sections against prior approvals to catch regressions.

diff_summary.description: Machine-facing summary of what changed between rounds.

leader_output.arbitration_rule: Arbitration is minor-only. Blocking or major disagreements never qualify for freeze by arbitration.

status_invariants.frozen: Allowed only when no unresolved findings remain and no repair pass is still required.
status_invariants.frozen_with_conditions: Allowed only when unresolved items, if any, are minor or suggestion only and any arbitration used was minor-only.
status_invariants.pushback: Required when blocking or major findings remain and review budget still permits another repair and re-review round.
status_invariants.resume_required: Required when blocking or major findings remain and the review budget is exhausted.
status_invariants.blocked: Required for unrecoverable validation, structural, or execution errors.

leader_output.invalid_status_handling: If the selected status conflicts with the unresolved set or the arbitration rule, fail closed, record the override, and return a safe effective status.

audit_requirements.field_ownership: Audit field vocabulary is contract-owned. Runtime code and rulebooks may reference it but must not redefine or silently remap it.
